title: ChroamVented
description:
Texture pack used in my old videos
Name Swords Optimizer, or Vented
Axe: SkullCrusher
body: This is my old texture pack that has animations that are on everyday used items, such as ender pearls, water buckets, steak, porkchop, glimmer on the tools that are Iron, Diamond, Gold, And Netherite. There are more animations to this pack that you will see in the foods, blocks, and potions. There are also 3 custom item textures, one for a Diamond/Netherite Axe, and the other 2 are for sword, if you name the axe, "Skull Crusher" you will have a blue with pink outline axe. If you name the sword Optimizer, you will get a pink sword that looks pretty cool, but if you are not a fan of how big the sword is, then just name it "Vented" and it will be a low blue sword that isnt that big in my opinion. This texture pack also gives you very comfortable features such as, lower shield, low fire, and smaller totem pop.
